meaning: adj.[生化]非酶的,不涉及酶作用的
examples: These data suggest that nonenzymatic glycosylation of lens crystallins may contribute to cataract formation.
In contrast, the nonenzymatic process adds glucose haphazardly to any of several sites along any available peptide chain within a protein molecule.
Gastric mucosa has developed several endogenous antioxidant systems including enzymatic and nonenzymatic groups.
